final:
module UpDownCounter (
    input reset_clk,
    input en,
    input up_down,
    output reg [2:0] count
);

    always @(posedge reset_clk) begin
        if (en) begin
            if (up_down) begin
                count <= count + 1;
            end else begin
                count <= count - 1;
            end
        end
    end
endmodule
